remarks: Commuters' delight! This hidden gem is a recently renovated and updated 1 bedroom in charming Westport close to train and downtown for enjoyable restaurant dining & lots of shopping. Metro train is approximately a 5 minute car ride and is walkable ! I-95 also close! Downtown you will find the beautiful Westport Library which offers great community and fun events. Only minutes away also, is the historic Westport Playhouse, a local theater venue offering performances & year round events with notable performers & acclaimed actors. Incredible restaurants line the train station location for easy dining plans as you finish your commute & train ride. This unit is also close to boutique luxury hotels such as the Inn at Longshore & the Delamar Hotels in Westport & Southport. Enjoy their fine dining, or relax with their heavenly spa treatments. If you are a golfer, the Longshore Golf Course is again, only minutes away. Unit is bathed in lots of sunlight, has beautiful hardwood floors and recessed lighting. Kitchen is bright with beautiful white cabinets. Bath is also updated with glass enclosed shower. Unit is located on 2nd level of building. Washer/ dryer in unit. This unit makes for a convenient pied-a-terre. Street parking. No walking property without appointment. Excellent credit and references a must. Credit application through RentSpree must be properly & completely filled out with employment, residence history, references
